name: Dimerix Limited
analysis: DXB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 67% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2200, stop A$0.1559, target A$0.2500 (0.47:1) — then trail it.
